tb_1770577538_1.title: Fix file positioning in directed mode
tb_1770577538_1.description: New files appear in middle of tree. Should appear at top (highest Y-axis). Sort by creation date.

tb_1770577538_2.title: Wire highlight_artifacts to frontend
tb_1770577538_2.description: highlight_artifacts not used in frontend. Need to connect CAM surprise metrics/Engram.

tb_1770577538_3.title: Chat star/favorite toggle
tb_1770577538_3.description: Chats should have ability to set stars/favorites.

tb_1770577538_4.title: Solo chat model provider persistence
tb_1770577538_4.description: In solo chat, model provider API key name does not persist, falls back to openrouter on re-entry.

tb_1770577538_5.title: Fix single file import (drag and drop)
tb_1770577538_5.description: File import is broken - sometimes cannot drop single file, only folders work. VETKA should react when files are dropped.

tb_1770577538_6.title: @titan command in chat popup solo/team
tb_1770577538_6.description: Add @titan command support to popup chat solo/team interface.

tb_1770577538_7.title: Fix group chat naming bug
tb_1770577538_7.description: Group chat has two names. Edit name creates new chat, falls back to old untitled. When files-folder name is present, rename happens tragically.

tb_1770577538_8.title: File collapse/expand in folders
tb_1770577538_8.description: Files in folders should collapse and expand. Multiple folder modes - knowledge mode.

tb_1770577538_9.title: Research: search/embedding model categories
tb_1770577538_9.description: How to use models for search (like Tavily) or embedding, how to connect and display them. Separate category?

tb_1770577538_10.title: Research: folder content auto-detection
tb_1770577538_10.description: Auto-detect folder mode by content type: documents→knowledge+directed, video+audio→media-editor.

tb_1770577538_11.title: Research: unified search window architecture
tb_1770577538_11.description: Unified search window integrating soc/www/file search + Jarvis (superagent with user memory, default working settings).

tb_1770577538_12.title: Model fallback chain with key roaming
tb_1770577538_12.description: When model unavailable after key roaming, call local Hostess (ollama), then try other provider keys. Memory of successful connections for priority.
